Author: twelvehouse
Name: ChatAnywhere
Punchline: Chat in FFXIV from your browser anywhere.
Description: Host your chat on a web server so you can talk from anywhere.
Notice: This plugin is now available on the official Dalamud plugin repository. Distribution via this custom repository has ended. Please install it through the official repository instead.

Author: twelvehouse
Name: FootIK
Punchline: Foot IK for FFXIV — feet stay on the ground.
Description: Real-time foot IK for FFXIV characters. Keeps feet planted naturally on terrain (stairs, slopes, uneven ground) during normal gameplay.
Notice: This plugin is no longer maintained and has been archived. Distribution has ended.
